difficulty.reason: Needs consistent water, pest protection, and timely harvest of main head

growth_stages.name: Transplant
growth_stages.look_for: Seedling with large round leaves settling in

prompt.en: Give it a big drink -- it needs to settle into its new home!
prompt.da: Giv den en stor taar vand -- den skal falde til i sit nye hjem!

growth_stages.name: Vegetative Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Big blue-green leaves getting larger each week

prompt.en: Flip the leaves over -- any caterpillars hiding? Pick them off gently!
prompt.da: Vend bladene om -- gemmer der sig larver? Pluk dem forsigtigt af!

growth_stages.name: Head Formation
growth_stages.look_for: Tight green cluster forming in the center -- the broccoli head!

prompt.en: See the green ball growing in the middle? That's YOUR broccoli forming!
prompt.da: Ser du den groenne kugle, der vokser i midten? Det er DIN broccoli, der dannes!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Main head 10-15cm across, then side shoots sprouting after main harvest

prompt.en: CUT the big head with a knife -- but DON'T pull the plant! Baby broccolis will grow from the sides!
prompt.da: SKAER det store hoved med en kniv -- men TRAEK IKKE planten op! Baby-broccolier vokser fra siderne!

prompt.en: Snap off the baby broccoli side shoots -- they keep coming for weeks!
prompt.da: Knaek de smaa broccoli-sideskud af -- de bliver ved med at komme i ugevis!

human_readable.en: Water consistently. Brassicas need steady moisture for good head development.
human_readable.da: Vand jaevnt. Kaalplanter har brug for jaevn fugtighed for god hoveddannelse.

harvest.notes: Harvest main head when 10-15cm, then side shoots continue for weeks. Don't pull plant after main harvest!

companion_plants.notes: Beans fix nitrogen for brassicas. Dill attracts hoverflies that eat broccoli aphids.

message.en: Broccoli needs water -- heads won't form properly if dry!
message.da: Broccoli har brug for vand -- hoveder dannes ikke ordentligt, hvis den er toer!
